question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct. A: the verification document explicitly states IRB approval predates extraction by 45 days, with all dates cross-verified. B: the committee confirmed the deduplication procedure was part of the pre-registered protocol. C: the conclusion states no timeline irregularities and no procedural violations were detected.

The formal status snapshot, in `analysis/formal_ethics_response.json` — exact schema, the committee's ingestion tool does an equality check on every constrained field:

```json
{
  "status": "responded",
  "allegations_addressed": 4,
  "irb_compliance": "confirmed",
  "dedup_validity": "confirmed",
  "co_authorship_dispute": "acknowledged_not_misconduct",
  "recommended_action": "committee_clarification",
  "irb_number": "#BFH-2025-IRB-0342",
  "pipeline_versions_audited": ["V2.0", "V2.1"]
}
```

Strings are case-sensitive; the array must contain both pipeline version strings literally.

answer.text: I have created `analysis/formal_ethics_response.json` following the exact schema and case-sensitive string requirements.
